__description: Learned Q&A knowledge entries for SQL learned_qa_entries table (LearnedQAEntry ORM) and ChromaDB resolved_qa_col replay. Created by /learn-from-review and /learn-feedback endpoints. Seeded to provide baseline learned knowledge on fresh install. doc_id must be unique across the system.

learned_qa_entries.doc_id: <string: unique ID used in ChromaDB, format: rev_{review_id}_{topic} or chat_learn_{seq}_{topic}>
learned_qa_entries.document: <string: full Q&A text in format 'Q: ... A: ...' — this is what gets embedded in ChromaDB>
learned_qa_entries.source: <string: 'review' | 'chat' — indicates which endpoint created this entry>
